name: Pacific Clam and Corn Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the clams and reserve the liquid.
2. Add water to the reserved clam liquid to make 1 cup total.
3. Fry the bacon until crisp, then add the onion and cook until tender.
4. Add potatoes and nectar-water mixture; cover and simmer gently until potatoes are tender.
5. Add corn and milk to the pot.
6. Blend flour and butter together, then stir into the chowder.
7. Cook slowly until the mixture thickens slightly, stirring constantly.
8. Add seasonings (celery salt, salt, white pepper) and clams; simmer for five minutes.
9. Serve hot and top with cracker crumbs.
